title.en: Therefore, they did not dare to flee.

content.en:
The Iron Mu Domain Ancestor fell, and the five four-star kings such as the Yuanfeng Domain Ancestor were also a little nervous, but no one withdrew, and they were still frantically attacking Ye Tian.

They knew very well that they couldn't escape, not to mention whether they could escape, even if they could really escape, after the Ghost Fox Organization knew about it, it would be difficult for them to escape the sanctions of the Ghost Fox Organization.

The forces of the Ghost Fox Organization have cultivated them very hugely, and if they dare to escape, they will not also have to be punished unacceptably.

Therefore, they did not dare to flee.

"Holy Spear!"

Yuanfeng Domain Ancestor urged a large amount of soul holy light, and then used the holy technique holy spear, and integrated it into the holy spear with soul holy light, and even the entire body was shrouded in soul holy light.

At this moment, Yuanfeng Yuzu also fights.

Otherwise, he wouldn't be able to wait for the arrival of the Xuan Turtle Domain Ancestor, and their batch of four-star kings would have to fall a few more.

Even if he was strong and would not fall, if the other four-star kings fell, it would be difficult for him and the Xuan Ghost Domain Ancestor to kill Ye Tian alone.

Bang!

Yuanfeng Domain Ancestor held the holy spear in his hand and slammed into Ye Tian's body with one blow.

Originally, Yuanfeng Domain Ancestor could not attack Ye Tian, but the other Domain Ancestors used the secret technique of restraint, coupled with the suppression of the holy relics, which caused Ye Tian's speed to be seriously affected, and he was hit by Yuanfeng Domain Ancestor's holy spear.

I saw Ye Tian fly out upside down, and his defense was pierced, but under the recovery of the Immortal Saint Technique, the injury was nothing.

"Such a rich soul light!"

Ye Tian was quite surprised.

If he also had so many soul holy lights as Yuanfeng Domain Ancestor, his strength was far stronger than now, and he could easily kill a four-star king in seconds, even a four-star king like Yuanfeng Domain Ancestor would not be able to withstand his few attacks.

As time slowly passed, the five four-star kings gradually showed injuries, and two of them were seriously injured.

But this time, under the desperate efforts of the Yuanfeng Domain Ancestor, Ye Tian's Eternal Saint Technique was also difficult to freeze the instantaneous time, so it was difficult to find an opportunity to severely damage or even kill a four-star king.

Moreover, after a long battle, Ye Tian's consumption was very large.

Now, he had already consumed thirty percent of his domain power and soul holy light, and if he continued like this, his combat power would be affected.

Abrupt.

Ye Tian disappeared, and even the Yuanfeng Domain Ancestor could hardly find Ye Tian's traces.

"The Ancestor of the Ten Thousand Laws Domain has escaped into the depths of the void!"

Yuanfeng Yuzu reminded.

Deep in the Void.

Ye Tian hid here with the Empty Escape Holy Technique, and after the Empty Escape Holy Technique reached the extreme realm, he was able to hide in the depths of the void of the Dark Sacred Domain, which was close to the turbulence of time and space in the Dark Sacred Domain, and it was difficult for the Supreme Domain Ancestor to reach that level at all.

Even if it was the Yuanfeng Domain Ancestor, he could barely attack the depths of the void with a single blow with all his strength, even if he found Ye Tian's location, if Ye Tian didn't come out, he wouldn't be able to shake Ye Tian out with one blow.

At this time, Yuanfeng Domain Ancestor took out a holy relic similar to an eyeball.

This is a holy relic—Ten Thousand Pupils!

The holy relic of Wan Tong is mainly to assist in the insight formation and any concealment techniques, and it is a treasure that he often uses to assassinate enemies.

Rumble!!!!

Ten thousand pupils urged, and wisps of light penetrated into the depths of the void.

Soon, Yuanfeng Domain Ancestor found Ye Tian's location.

He originally thought that Ye Tian had escaped into the depths of the void in order to sneak attack them.

However, Ye Tian had been staying there all the time, and he had no intention of sneaking up at all.

"Oh no, he's regaining his strength!"

The ancestor of Yuanfeng Domain came to his senses.

That's right, Ye Tian is indeed recovering his strength.

After consuming so much domain power and soul holy light, Ye Tian naturally needed to recover urgently.

However, he would not run away to regain his strength, so he could only choose to retreat into the depths of the void and take the holy medicine specially used to restore his strength.

Now.

In the depths of the void, Ye Tian accelerated time, and one by one the holy medicines were refined by him, and his own strength quickly recovered, and even the soul holy light gradually returned to its heyday.

Soon after, Ye Tian's state was full.

......

"Be careful!"

Yuanfeng Domain Ancestor sensed through Ten Thousand Pupils that Ye Tian had come out of the depths of the void, and pointed directly at one of the four-star kings.

Ye Tian, who had recovered from his state, fought very hard, and he had the Immortal Saint Technique of the Extreme Realm, so he was not worried about his safety.

Under such an offensive, the five four-star kings were defeated one after another.

In the end, another four-star king failed to save his life and was killed by Ye Tian.

What everyone didn't know was that far away, an invincible domain ancestor was still watching the battle.

This person is not the Thunder Steel Domain Ancestor, but one of the Ten Emperors of the Ghost Fox Organization - the Bird Battle Domain Ancestor, and next to the Bird War Domain Ancestor, there is a Supreme Domain Ancestor, who is the Qingyang Domain Ancestor.

The Bird Battle Domain Ancestor urged a holy relic and projected the picture of Ye Tian's battle, and the Qingyang Domain Ancestor naturally saw the picture of the battle.

"Lord Bird Battle Domain Ancestor, Yuanfeng Domain Ancestor, a few of them are scraps, they can't kill that Ten Thousand Laws Domain Ancestor at all, I have also watched the battle of Ten Thousand Laws Domain Ancestor, his strength is indeed very strong, but he is not my opponent, it is not a problem to kill him with my strength. Besides, I have the strongest holy artifact of our Ghost Fox Organization, the Taichen Sword's projection sword, and its power is also very terrifying, once I urge the Taichen Sword with my strength, it is enough to instantly hit the ancestor of the Ten Thousand Laws Domain, and then harvest his life with the Cause and Effect Holy Technique, which is enough to kill his body in the air!"

Qingyang Domain Ancestor said confidently.

"Wait!"

The Sparrow Battle Domain Ancestor muttered.

He was waiting for the arrival of the Xuan Ghost Domain Ancestor, once the Xuan Ghost Domain Ancestor and the Yuanfeng Domain Ancestor were united, there might be a way to kill the Ten Thousand Law Domain Ancestor.

It's not that he doesn't want Qingyang Domain Ancestor to make a move, but if he lets Qingyang Domain Ancestor make a move, the price he pays will be relatively large.

Qingyang Domain Ancestor pursed his lips, he also knew that the Sparrow Battle Domain Ancestor didn't want the Ghost Fox Organization to pay those costs, but he was not in a hurry.

Anyway, he didn't think that those scrap materials could solve Ye Tian.

In fact, he also hoped that those scrap materials would persist a little more, so that he could better understand Ye Tian's strength.

Distance.

The battle continues.

Yuanfeng Yuzu and the others retreated step by step, and their injuries were not light.

It was at this time that the Ancestor of the Xuan Ghost Domain arrived.

"Ghost, you're late!"

Yuanfeng Domain Ancestor said coldly.

"No way, you give me a short notice, it's good that I can come over in time!"

The Ghost Domain Ancestor sneered.

"Together, kill him!"

Yuanfeng Yuzu hurriedly said.

"Good!"

The Mysterious Ghost Domain Ancestor nodded.

With the addition of the Xuan Ghost Domain Ancestor, Ye Tian suddenly had some pressure.

The two sides continued to fight, Ye Tian's defense was broken again and again, and he gradually became injured, and his strength was seriously depleted.

However, once his combat power decreased, he retreated into the void to regain his strength.

And the Xuan Ghost Domain Ancestor will also take the opportunity to recover from his injuries, and the two sides are deadlocked.

However, what the Xuan Ghost Domain Ancestor and the others didn't notice was that Ye Tian was getting more and more excited to fight, and his will to fight was getting stronger and stronger.

What they didn't know was that Ye Tian was using this battle to refine his holy body.

His holy body is an eternal and immortal holy body, and he has already reached the Great Perfection realm in the consummation realm, and he is only one step away from stepping into the extreme realm, but this step is very difficult.

Even if he spent countless resources and countless years, he couldn't break this shackle.

So, he hopes to break this shackle by fighting.

Although he is now copying his body, copying his body, like his body, can also cultivate and break the shackles.

Once the copy body breaks the shackles and has the experience of breaking through, the ontology breaks the shackles and cultivates the Eternal Immortal Holy Body to the limit, which is naturally many times easier.

"Pressure, I need enough pressure!"

At this moment, Ye Tian hoped that a more powerful four-star king would appear in the Ghost Fox Organization!
